hooks.command: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const out=execSync('git status --porcelain src public',{encoding:'utf8'});const touched=out.split(/\r?\n/).some(l=>l.trim()&&/\s(src|public)\//.test(' '+l));const ai=execSync('git diff --cached --name-only CLAUDE.md 2>NUL || echo',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();if(touched){process.stderr.write('[CLAUDE.md reminder] Source files under src/ or public/ changed this session — reopen CLAUDE.md and reconcile the directory map, routes and key patterns before ending.\n');}}catch(e){}"
